hero.description: Built by Montrealers, for Montrealers. Report potholes, snow plow misses, cracked pavement, and other street issues — so crews fix what your neighbourhood actually sees.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.question1: What kinds of issues can I report?
faq.answer1: You can report potholes, cracked or uneven pavement, damaged curbs, faded line markings, missing or damaged signs, drainage problems, and other street infrastructure issues across Montreal.
faq.question2: Do I need an account to submit a report?
faq.answer2: No account is required for a one-time report. Creating a free account lets you save your reports, upload multiple photos, and get status updates when the issue is acknowledged or fixed.
faq.question3: How do I add a photo or exact location?
faq.answer3: When you start a report, you can drop a pin on the map or use your device's location. Attach one or more photos so crews can see the size and severity of the problem.
faq.question4: Does reporting cover all of Montreal?
faq.answer4: Yes. Reports can be submitted for any of Montreal's 19 boroughs. Issues are routed to the appropriate city service based on the location and type of problem.
faq.question5: What happens after I submit a report?
faq.answer5: Your report is logged and reviewed. Depending on priority and weather, repairs may be scheduled within days or weeks. You can check status on your report if you created an account.
faq.answer6: Yes. Submitting reports and tracking basic status is completely free for residents.

whyChooseUs.label: why report with us
whyChooseUs.title:
WHY MaVille.club HELPS
FIX MONTREAL'S STREETS
whyChooseUs.feature1Description: Submit potholes and road defects in under a minute from your phone or computer
whyChooseUs.feature2Description: Report issues in all 19 boroughs — from downtown to the outer neighborhoods
whyChooseUs.feature3Description: Pin the exact spot and attach photos so crews know what to fix before they arrive
whyChooseUs.feature4Description: Built for how Montreal handles street maintenance, 311, and borough-level repairs
whyChooseUs.mapHint: Pin an issue on the map and send it to the right borough team
whyChooseUs.card1Description: Report potholes and worn pavement on busy Plateau streets. Help keep cycling and pedestrian routes safe year-round.
whyChooseUs.card2Description: Flag damaged roads, curbs, and markings in downtown and the Old Port. High-traffic areas get faster attention when reports include photos.
whyChooseUs.card3Description: Document cracks and potholes on residential streets. Your reports help prioritize repairs in family neighborhoods.
whyChooseUs.card4Description: Report road issues along the waterfront and main arteries. Stay involved in keeping Verdun's streets smooth and safe.
